title: Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh with a Z-Score of +4.29. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is relatively low at 18%, and the wind speed is moderate at 10.6 km/h. 
 The lack of heating degree days, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, indicates that the heat wave is the dominant weather factor.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
